name: Pashupatastra
description: The weapon of Lord Shiva, the most destructive personal weapon of the divine trinity. It can be discharged by the mind, eyes, words, or a bow. When invoked, it manifests devastating power that cannot be resisted by any mortal or lesser divine being.
special_effects: Destroys all creation in its path
limitations: Must never be used against lesser enemies
Krishna prevented Arjuna from using it at Kurukshetra
invocation: Granted by Lord Shiva after Arjuna's penance at Indrakeeladri
